effects.name: DIMETRO
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from Dimetro. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Magma Diver
effects.effect: Each time a FIRE Vivosaur(s) is exerted from an FP Zone: deal 50 damage to all of your Opponent's Vivosaurs.

effects.name: Lugmos Tail
effects.effect: Target 1 FIRE Vivosaurs in your discard pile; Charge it.

effects.name: Lugmos Blaster
effects.effect: Apply Scare to all of your Opponent's Vivosaurs that are damaged.
